content: @xyflow/react (React Flow v12) is the recommended library for interactive node graphs in React. Version 12 adds: full SSR support, dark mode with colorMode prop, CSS variables for theming, Tailwind CSS 4 support (as of Oct 2025 update), React 19 compatibility. Custom nodes and edges are easy via React components. Performance is good for hundreds of nodes (WC3 roadmap scale) but degrades at 10k+. Official UI component kit uses shadcn + Tailwind. Has built-in pan/zoom, minimap, controls.
